title: Noisy benchstat output (± > 5%) — skill must recommend -benchtime=2s or -count=20
benchmark_snippet:
name           old time/op    new time/op    delta
Encode/1KB     840ns ± 12%    780ns ± 9%    -7.1%  (p=0.082 n=5+5)

expected_feedback: benchmark results are too noisy to trust (± > 5%); recommend -benchtime=2s or -count=20; p=0.082 means the result is not statistically significant
